name: Dallas Independent School District
about: Dallas Independent School District serves approximately 141,000 students and is the second largest school district in Texas.
calendarNotes: Dallas ISD starts the school year in early August, consistent with most Texas districts that begin ahead of the national average. Spring Break falls in mid-March, broadly aligned with the DFW metro area. Families coordinating with suburban districts like Plano, Frisco, or Irving should verify exact Spring Break dates, as they sometimes differ by a day or two despite geographic proximity. Dallas summers are extremely hot, and the early school start allows the district to bank instructional days before June heat peaks. Families new to Dallas should note that magnet and choice school enrollment opens in January — months before the school year — making early planning essential.
